programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Porter Family vs. Bruneske Family.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Steve Harvey hosts a game featuring the Stamper family against the Bruneske family; the two families compete to get the most survey questions correct.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: Newlyweds Preston and Cierra battle married couple David and Connie.

programme.title: The Perfect Line
programme.desc: Players Craig, Erin, Lee-Ann and Keisha.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Steve Harvey hosts; two families compete to guess the answers to various surveys.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution
programme.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Hope for Pain Sufferers
programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.title: Mercy Ships
programme.desc: Mercy Ship's crew of world class medical volunteers sail across the globe providing lifesaving surgeries to those with nowhere else to turn.

programme.title: Match Game
programme.desc: Gene Rayburn hosts this comedy-game show hybrid in which contestants try to match answers given by celebrities to humorous, and often risque, fill-in-the-blank questions. The contestant with the most points at the end of the game advances to play the bonus round, in which the contestant has a chance to win thousands of dollars, with the actual amount dependent on the rules in place at the time of the episode.

programme.title: Match Game
programme.desc: Gene Rayburn hosts this comedy-game show hybrid in which contestants try to match answers given by celebrities to humorous, and often risque, fill-in-the-blank questions. The contestant with the most points at the end of the game advances to play the bonus round, in which the contestant has a chance to win thousands of dollars, with the actual amount dependent on the rules in place at the time of the episode.

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: Two teams of three compete to complete a chain of words after the first and last words in the chain are revealed.

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: Two teams of three compete to complete a chain of words after the first and last words in the chain are revealed.

programme.title: Catch 21
programme.desc: Aces For Everyone; players add cards by answering pop trivia questions and try to build the closest hand to 21 without busting in this fast-action game of knowledge and strategy.

programme.title: Catch 21
programme.desc: Aces For Everyone; players add cards by answering pop trivia questions and try to build the closest hand to 21 without busting in this fast-action game of knowledge and strategy.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting taxi cab passengers answer trivia questions posed by host Ben Bailey; the passengers may reach their destination with cold hard cash or walk away empty-handed.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In Las Vegas.

programme.title: The $100,000 Pyramid
programme.sub-title: Leslie Jones vs. Taye Diggs and Sara Foster vs. Erin Foster
programme.desc: Celebrity battles, featuring Leslie Jones, Taye Diggs, Sara Foster and Erin Foster.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: A man from California returns to finish his game; a woman from Florida plays to win up to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: A Florida woman returns to finish her game; a man from Arizona plays for up to $1 million.

programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: Master Minds
programme.desc: Three challengers take on some of the great minds in trivia in a showdown of smarts and strategy; the last contestant standing will face off against the highest scoring Master Mind in a head-to-head battle.

programme.title: The Perfect Line
programme.desc: Carol, Isabella, Brittany, and Blaine.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: Daughter and mom Dajhena and Tameka take on married couple Nick and Emily.

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: "Chain Reaction" is back with fan-favorite Dylan Lane returning as host of the popular word puzzle game in which players compete to form chains composed of two-word phrases.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.sub-title: Bring Back the Needles of Death
programme.desc: Victoria Groce returns as the featured chaser when she goes head-to-head in a trivia battle against an emergency room doctor, a fashion blogger and a data analyst.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Sisters Karen and Lori face the wall; they started a charity that puts hand dryers for gloves in every classroom to help kids deal with harsh Michigan winters.

programme.title: Press Your Luck
programme.desc: Contestants from Queen Creek, Ariz., Chandler, Ariz. and Ruckersville, Va.

programme.title: Emma: Natural Relief for Bloating, Constipation & Gut Imbalance
programme.desc: Tired of bloating or gut issues that won't go away?; discovering the root cause-and how Emma can help eliminate methane-producing archaea, reset digestion and restore balance naturally.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution
programme.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Hope for Pain Sufferers
programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.desc: Gene Rayburn hosts this comedy-game show hybrid in which contestants try to match answers given by celebrities to humorous, and often risque, fill-in-the-blank questions. programme.title: The Chase
programme.sub-title: Guess They Don't Teach Math at Harvard
programme.desc: James Holzhauer returns as the featured chaser, facing off in a battle of wits against a social services program manager, a game designer and a technology executive.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Husband and wife Tiffany and CJ from Levittown, Pa., both police officers, have dedicated their lives to the community; the two take on the new Superdrop in hopes of conquering the wall.
